creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Nagy from comment #1)

Thanks. Shall I raise an issue or PR there, and we can close the bug report here? 

A PR for <https://github.com/freebsd/chromium/blob/master/README.md> might simply state something like: 

> Development of the port now is decentralised (no longer 
> centralised in this repo)

Maybe with a link out to <https://www.freshports.org/www/chromium/>. 

Plus a change to the About line at the front of the repo. 

----

<https://github.com/gliaskos/freebsd-chromium#readme> (but not freebsd/chromium) leads to <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Chromium>. The wiki will benefit from an update after things are clearer here and in GitHub.
